heading: Consultation by Secretary with other Federal departments, etc.
label: 5314 Consultation by Secretary with other Federal departments, etc.
text: In carrying out the provisions of this chapter including the issuance of regulations, the Secretary shall consult with other Federal departments and agencies administering Federal grant-in-aid programs.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title I of , , , which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of title I to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 93–38388 Stat. 633Aug. 22, 1974
